_doc: Machine-readable selector map for the Skill-6 COMMUNITY / COURSE / CHANNEL builders (F3b: code and doc cannot diverge; the builders load THIS file). Companion prose: SELECTORS-LIVE-community.md + SELECTORS-LIVE-course.md. Anchors are recorded in Playwright getBy* notation and translated to agent-browser 0.27.0 `find`/native-eval calls by ghl_ab_executor.py (fix a). PHASE B (2026-07-10) LOCKed the in-area anchors from a full LIVE create-then-clean run on the operator test location (id masked).

_status_legend.verified-shared-rail: Confirmed live for forms/surveys on the SAME leadconnectorhq rail, or captured in references/form-click-map.md (global left rail). Cited; safe to act on.
_status_legend.locked: LOCKed by a live capture run for THIS object (Phase B 2026-07-10): a scratch object was created, walked, every anchor recorded live + read back, then the object was cleaned (course deleted 0-residue; group deactivated). Safe to drive.
_status_legend.capture-pending: NOT yet LOCKed. D8: NO invented CSS. A REQUIRED capture-pending anchor makes the live builder STOP-and-report until a live capture run flips it to 'locked'.

_exec_legend.auto: ghl_ab_executor: try `find <locator> <value> click [--name]`, native-eval .click() fallback on a find miss (default).
_exec_legend.native: ghl_ab_executor: go straight to a trusted DOM element.click() via eval. REQUIRED for GHL's Naive-UI submit buttons — proven live that `find ... click`/`click @ref` report Done but do NOT submit; only native .click() fires the create toast.
_exec_legend.scoped-native: A card/row-scoped native eval (builder _scoped_* helpers): locate the object's OWN card by name/slug, then click a control WITHIN that card. REQUIRED on the POPULATED operator account so a global first-match click can never hit a real object (group deactivate + course delete).

_capture_contract: Flip a target to status:'locked' ONLY by a live capture run (create a scratch object, walk it, record the real anchor + confidence, DELETE-or-deactivate the object). Phase B 2026-07-10 did this end-to-end.

_phase_b_live_proof.location: operator test (an-operator-test-location, operator — operator-owned, NOT client/template)
_phase_b_live_proof.account_shape: POPULATED production account (real member groups + 35 real courses) — every destructive control MUST be object-scoped (scoped-native), never a global first-match.
_phase_b_live_proof.community: Created scratch group + channel via find/fill/native-submit; portal read-back (name in rendered DOM); deactivated via app-list card-scoped Status dropdown -> Inactive -> Confirm dialog. White-label portal; group keyed by SLUG.
_phase_b_live_proof.course: Created scratch course via the 3-STEP WIZARD (Create New dropdown -> Start from scratch -> title -> Upload Thumbnail -> Set Up Pricing -> bottom Create Course); added a Module (+ Add Content -> Add Module) and a Lesson (+ Add Content -> Add Lesson, requires a Module select); read-back; DELETED via search-narrow -> card-scoped kebab -> Delete -> type CONFIRM -> Confirm; re-GET proved 0 residue (35 Products, 0 query results).
_phase_b_live_proof.nav_reality: Memberships left-rail text is a non-navigating SPAN on this account; the builder reaches the list by navigating the LIST route directly (the LIST route loads fine; only the builder/editor route spins).

community_group.evidence: PHASE B live: community GROUPS have NO delete. Cleanup = app communities-list card-scoped Status 'Active' dropdown -> 'Inactive' -> 'Deactivate Group' confirm dialog -> Confirm (toast 'Deactivated'). Portal group Settings dialog has Details/Subscriptions/Newsletter/Branding/Themes/Show-Hide-Tabs/Membership-Questions/Gamification — NO Delete/Danger Zone, NO status toggle (that lives on the APP list card). Tier-1/Tier-2 tool lists have NO delete_community/delete_group/delete_channel. Literal 0-residue is IMPOSSIBLE for a group; set Inactive. NOT a fake delete.

channel.evidence: No delete_channel on Tier 1/2. Phase B created a channel but did not locate a channel delete control. Channel residue remains inside its (deactivated) group.
channel.phase_b: capture the channel remove/delete control (if any).

course.evidence: PHASE B live: each course card has a per-card kebab menu -> 'Delete' -> a type-to-proceed confirm dialog naming the exact course ('Are you sure you want to delete "<name>"?') requiring the literal text CONFIRM -> Confirm. Proven true 0-residue (35->36 on create, 36->35 on delete; search 0 results). Tier-2 also ships delete_course*. The delete MUST be search-narrowed + card-scoped so it can never hit a real course.

fallbacks: navigate the list route directly (Phase B: the text node is a non-navigating SPAN on some accounts)
memberships_left_rail.note: Phase B: on the operator account the 'Memberships' text is a SPAN that does NOT navigate (the real nav link href=/memberships/client-portal/dashboard). The builders now reach the communities/courses LIST by navigating the list route directly (routes.*_list) — the LIST route loads reliably; only the builder/editor route spins.

builder_save.note: Publish/save inside the course/community editor — not exercised in Phase B (default DRAFT).

_idempotency.note: fix b: the communities list has NO search box — enumerate the rendered group list and match by name/slug via ghl_community_builder._list_has.

_identity.note: fix c: after Create the SPA lands on https://<portal_host>/communities/groups/<slug>/home. Groups keyed by SLUG (no opaque id). Phase B live: portal_host = white-label domain; slug auto-derived from the name.

communities_list.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: LIVE-navigated directly (loads reliably); content is in the TOP document under app.convertandflow.com (NOT an iframe).
fallbacks: Memberships link href=/memberships/client-portal/dashboard then Communities sub-nav
communities_list.note: The builder navigates HERE directly (C1) instead of clicking Memberships text (which does not navigate).

group_portal.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: post-create URL on the white-label community portal; group keyed by SLUG; default channel 'Announcements'; tabs Discussion/Learning/Events/Leaderboard/Members/About.
fallbacks: read location.href after Create; derive host+slug

create_group_button.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: `find role button click --name 'Create Group'` opened a FULL PAGE /memberships/communities/create-group.

name_input.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: `find placeholder 'Group Name' fill` bound; slug auto-derived.

slug_input.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: auto-filled from the name (slug = group identity key).
fallbacks: auto-derived; leave default unless a collision

privacy_switch.observed: Phase B used a PUBLIC group (default) so the privacy switch was not exercised; still capture-pending.
fallbacks: Public/Private radio or switch on the create page
privacy_switch.note: Default is PUBLIC; only touched when plan.privacy == private (required=false).

create_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: native element.click() on the 'Create Group' submit created the group (landed on the portal). find/@ref click do NOT submit. exec:native REQUIRED.
fallbacks: native DOM .click() on the 'Create Group' submit

add_channel_control.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: button '+ Add Channel' (accessible name matches 'Add Channel').

channel_create_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: native .click() on 'CREATE CHANNEL' created the channel (landed on the channel URL).

deactivate._flow: scoped-native: navigate communities list -> find the created group's CARD by name/slug -> click its Status 'Active' dropdown (card-scoped) -> click 'Inactive' option -> 'Deactivate Group' confirm dialog -> Confirm.

status_dropdown.anchor: card-scoped Status 'Active' dropdown on the group's own list card
status_dropdown.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: each group card shows 'Status: Active'; clicking the card's OWN dropdown opens an 'Inactive' option. MUST be card-scoped (a global 'Active' would hit another group / the list filter).

inactive_option.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: the open dropdown's 'inactive' option; selecting it raises the confirm dialog.
fallbacks: the 'Inactive' option in the open status dropdown

confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Deactivate Group — Are you sure?' dialog; Confirm completed it (toast 'Deactivated', card Status=Inactive).
fallbacks: Confirm in the Deactivate Group dialog
portal group Settings dialog (Details/Branding/... — NO status toggle here)
settings_nav.note: SUPERSEDED by community.deactivate.* — Phase B proved the Active/Inactive toggle is NOT in the portal group Settings dialog; it is the app-list card Status dropdown. Left capture-pending; not used for cleanup.

status_toggle.note: SUPERSEDED — see community.deactivate (a global getByText('Active') is UNSAFE on a populated list).

_idempotency.note: fix b: idempotency = list-scan by name/slug. The 'Search Courses' box (list_page.search_box) IS present and is used to ISOLATE the scratch course before a card-scoped delete (safety).

_cleanup.note: fix d: courses ARE deletable (true 0-residue). MUST search-narrow + card-scope + type-CONFIRM so a real member course can never be hit.

course._create_flow: 3-step WIZARD: list_page.create_course_button ('Create New' DROPDOWN) -> list_page.create_source ('Start from scratch') -> create_modal.name_input ('Enter course title') -> create_modal.next_thumbnail ('Upload Thumbnail') -> create_modal.next_pricing ('Set Up Pricing') -> create_modal.create_confirm (BOTTOM 'Create Course', native). The TOP 'Create Course' is a BACK-nav, not the submit.

outline_builder.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: the course-creator-studio outline builder (reached after final Create Course).

search_box.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Search Courses' box; used to isolate the scratch course before delete.

create_course_button.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Create New' is a DROPDOWN (options: 'Start from scratch', 'Import from Kajabi').

create_source.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: the 'Create New' menu option that opens the create wizard.
fallbacks: 'Start from scratch' in the Create New menu

row_actions.anchor: card-scoped kebab (More actions) on the scratch course's own card (after search-narrow)
row_actions.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: per-card kebab. MUST search-narrow first + card-scope (a blind first-'More actions' would hit a REAL course).

delete_menuitem.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: kebab menu 'Delete' (after Manage Comments/Edit Details/Clone).
fallbacks: 'Delete' in the open card kebab menu

delete_type_input.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: the delete dialog names the exact course and requires typing the literal 'CONFIRM' (reactive fill) to enable Confirm.
fallbacks: the type-to-proceed input in the delete dialog

delete_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Confirm' in the delete dialog completes a true 0-residue delete.
delete_confirm.note: confirm dialog after Delete + typing CONFIRM -> true 0-residue (fix d).

next_thumbnail.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: step-1 Next button 'Upload Thumbnail' (advances to step 2).
fallbacks: the bottom-right Next button on step 1

next_pricing.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: step-2 Next button 'Set Up Pricing' (thumbnail optional).
fallbacks: the bottom-right Next button on step 2

product_type.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: NO product-type choice is presented in the wizard (not applicable).
product_type.note: Not applicable — the wizard has no product-type step.

create_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: step-3 (Pricing) BOTTOM 'Create Course' button (y>600) finalizes (toast 'Course Created!'). The TOP 'Create Course' is a BACK-nav — the builder targets the bottom-most via ghl_course_builder._click_final_create.

add_content.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: '+ Add Content' opens a menu (Add Module / Add Sub-module / Add Lesson).

add_module.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: '+ Add Content' menu -> 'Add Module' opens the module dialog.
fallbacks: 'Add Module' in the Add Content menu

module_title_input.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: module dialog input (NOT 'Module title').

module_create_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Create Module' submits the module dialog (module appeared in outline).

add_lesson.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: '+ Add Content' menu -> 'Add Lesson' opens the lesson dialog.
fallbacks: 'Add Lesson' in the Add Content menu

lesson_title_input.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: lesson dialog Title (NOT 'Lesson title'); needs a reactive fill (value-set + input/change) to enable submit.

lesson_module_select.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Create Lesson' stays DISABLED until a Module is chosen; open 'Select Module' and pick the module via full mouse events (mousedown+mouseup+click).

lesson_create_confirm.observed: Phase B 2026-07-10: 'Create Lesson' (enabled after title + module) adds the lesson to the outline.

lesson_body_editor.observed: Phase B did not populate lesson body (existence read-back was title-level); the RTE lives in the lesson editor opened after create.
fallbacks: RTE inside the lesson panel — set via .setValue(); media as a CDN link, never key-by-key/upload
lesson_body_editor.note: Media is NEVER browser-uploaded — a ghl_media CDN URL is inserted as a link/embed (spec §5.2).
